Discover India

India

India is a land of vibrant colors, rich traditions, and
diverse cultures, where every corner tells a story.

Learn more
Explore Rajasthan

Rajasthan

The ‘Land of Kings’. No state in India has as many
magnificent palaces, forts, and colorful festivals as Rajasthan.

Read more

Welcome to Reve India Tours

Reve India Tours is an experienced driver-based tour operator based in Delhi since 1998. We specialize in day tours and private tours for all types of travelers, as well as customized group trips upon request. Our team of knowledgeable travel planners are committed to providing personalized service tailored to each customer’s individual needs and preferences.

At Reve India Tours, we have been providing a range of tour and travel services. We specialize in customizing packages to suit our customers’ needs, from arranging taxis with drivers and day tours to hiring guides and operators for larger trips. Our goal is always to provide the best possible experience at competitive prices. With over two decades of expertise under our belt, you can trust us to create your own personalized Indian adventure!

Learn more

One Day Trips

Escape the hustle and bustle of Delhi for a day with these exciting one-day trips! From ancient marvels to stunning natural retreats, you can explore diverse landscapes and cultures in just 24 hours. Keep reading to find out more about these amazing getaways from Delhi!

Why Travel with Us

One Stop Services

You can rely on us for all your travel needs, including hotel booking, tour arrangements, car rental, and mobile.

Quality Services

We strive to offer our customers superior quality services. Maintain high ethical and professional standards.

Save Money

We always provide the best available rates and recommend ways to save money. Get the best holiday packages with us.

24/7 Travel Support

Our highly qualified and experienced executives are always available to provide you with the best solution during your trip.

Airport Transfers

Efficient and reliable airport transfers for a stress-free journey. Book our services for prompt pickups and comfortable rides to your destination.

Group Travel Packages

Explore group travel effortlessly with our tailored packages. Benefit from hassle-free planning, exclusive deals, and unforgettable moments on your next adventure.

Sightseeing Tours

Explore city wonders with expert guides, comfortable transportation, and unforgettable experiences on our captivating sightseeing tours.

Car Rentals

Discover Delhi hassle-free with our car rentals. Quality vehicles, affordable rates, and 24/7 support ensure a seamless travel experience.

Guest's Pictures

What Our Clients Say

Client reviews on India tours can be found on the websites or social media pages of the tour providers, providing insights into the quality of their services and customer experiences..

Niki Sornsri

Highly recommended! Our 8-day Rajasthan trip was fantastic. The tour arrangements were excellent, and our driver was great. Special thanks to Prakash and Gajraj for ensuring a smooth and memorable experience!

Roland Oderbolz

Fabulous 21-day trip exploring Rajasthan's forts, temples, and desert locations. Rishi went above and beyond to create a truly unforgettable experience. Highly recommended for a once-in-a-lifetime adventure!

Yasmin Salajee

Highly professional and friendly tour company, exceeding all requests. I highly recommend it for anyone visiting India. Packed our itinerary with amazing experiences, forging lasting friendships. Thank you!

Reve India Tours is a leading tour operator based in New Delhi, India. Established in 1998, the company provides high-quality services and offers an array of holiday packages for travelers across India.
